name: H2O AMERICA
business: H2O America provides water and wastewater services through regulated utilities in California, Connecticut, Texas, and Maine, and also offers non-tariffed services such as contract water and sewer operations, real estate management, and service line protection plans.
namedSuppliers: South Central Connecticut Regional Water Authority (RWA)
West Travis County Public Utility Agency (WTCPUA)

exposures.sentence: The principal business of H2O America consists of the production, purchase, storage, purification, distribution, wholesale and retail sale of water and wastewater services.

catalysts.event: TWC filed Sale, Transfer & Merger application with PUCT for Quadvest acquisition
catalysts.sentence: TWC filed its Sale, Transfer & Merger ( STM ) application with the PUCT in January 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected PUCT approval of Quadvest acquisition
catalysts.sentence: While we expect the transaction to receive PUCT approval by mid-2026, the exact timeline for this approval process is unknown and may not occur until later, if at all.
The final regulation requires water systems to comply with PFAS monitoring and reporting requirements by 2027.

catalysts.event: PFAS maximum contaminant levels compliance deadline
catalysts.sentence: The final regulation requires water systems to comply with PFAS monitoring and reporting requirements by 2027, and to comply with the maximum contaminant levels by 2029.
Water Utility Services has budgeted 2026 capital expenditures of approximately $458,000, excluding capital expenditures financed by customer contributions and advances.
